## 📋 Today's Overview
*May 06, 2026*

### Superconductivity (13 new today)

1.  The study focuses on **superconducting bilayer nickelates**, employing an analysis of interlayer five-spin polarons to address the interplay between magnetic ground states and multi-orbital physics for establishing a microscopic mechanism of superconductivity.
2.  The study focuses on **superconducting qubits**, employing multi-photon spectroscopy and TLS strain tuning to address readout failures caused by a strongly coupled two-level system (TLS) defect in the tunnel barrier.
3.  The study focuses on **ultrathin NiBi3 films**, employing dimensional confinement to address the achievement of a highly field-resilient superconducting state that surpasses the spin-paramagnetic limit.
4.  The study focuses on **La3Ni2O7**, employing a symmetry-based perspective to address the discrepancy in transition temperature between its pressurized bulk form and its ambient-pressure thin-film form.
5.  The study focuses on the **kagome superconductor CsV3Sb5**, employing measurements of nonreciprocal superconducting critical currents at zero magnetic field to address the determination of time-reversal symmetry and chirality in the superconducting state.
6.  The study focuses on **Mo2C nanoflakes**, employing chemical vapor deposition to address the discovery of the superconducting diode effect in a material traditionally considered centrosymmetric.
7.  The study focuses on **NbTi superconducting thin-film resonators**, employing surface nanostructuring to address the enhancement of their performance for on-chip cryogenic thermometry.
8.  The study focuses on **Ti4Co2O**, employing electrical transport measurements under pressure to address the non-monotonic pressure dependence of its superconducting transition temperature and upper critical field.
9.  The study focuses on a **metallic niobium sheet**, employing phonon engineering via periodic thru-holes to address the observation of a zero-resistance state persisting up to 290 K.
10. The study focuses on **superconducting fault-tolerant quantum computers**, employing an analysis of integration and resource estimation to address the scaling challenge of the classical control and readout stack.
11. The study focuses on a **two-dimensional p-wave magnet**, employing a study of superconducting instabilities on a square lattice to address the realization of topological Ising superconductivity via non-relativistic exchange fields.
12. The study focuses on the **asymmetric Hatsugai-Kohmoto model**, employing an investigation of the superconducting diode effect to address the impact of strong electron-electron interactions on nonreciprocal supercurrent.
13. The study focuses on **disordered materials and heterostructures**, employing quantum kinetic transport equations to address the interplay between superconductivity and altermagnetism, identifying a coupling between spin and spatial variation of the order parameter.

### spin glass (4 new today)

1. The study focuses on the Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) model, employing a rigorous mathematical analysis to address the notoriously difficult problem of deriving the free energy limit at high temperature.
2. The study focuses on spin glasses, employing an analysis of coupled systems with independent disorders to address how the locking of the order parameter (synchronization) depends on coupling strength and involves non-perturbative effects.
3. The study focuses on molecular ensembles coupled to optical cavities, employing a diagrammatic cavity-mediated approach to address the intractable problem of describing collective electronic correlations and transverse correlation channels.
4. The study focuses on the Edwards-Anderson model with Gaussian couplings, employing rigorous mathematical proofs to address the problem of establishing zero-temperature signatures of glassy behavior, such as ground state sensitivity to perturbations, in finite-dimensional systems.

| 1 | **[Interlayer Five-Spin Polaron in Superconducting Bilayer Nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02891v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The discovery of high-$T_c$ superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates has sparked substantial effort towards understanding unconventional electronic states beyond a traditional cuprate-like d^9 configurational ground state. An understanding of the interplay between magnetic ground states and multi-orbital physics is key for establishing a microscopic mechanism for superconductivity. In the bilayer nickelates, spin density wave (SDW) order is a prominent feature in the non-superconducting regime. However, its relation to superconducting pairing remains an open question. Here, we use resonant x-ray scattering to examine the existence of SDW order in superconducting bilayer nickelate thin films La$_2$PrNi$_2$O$_7$ (LPNO). Comparing superconducting and oxygen-deficient LPNO thin films, we find that superconductivity occurs in SDW-free, oxygen-stoichiometric regions, whereas oxygen-deficiency promotes SDW order, indicating phase segregation of SDW and superconductivity. Furthermore, Ni-$L_3$ and O-$K$ edge spectroscopy reveals distinct electronic structures - particularly along the $c$-axis - between the two domains. Our results identify oxygen stoichiometry as a key parameter controlling interlayer coupling and thus the electronic structure of bilayer nickelates. In concert with theory, we propose that a ligand hole primarily resides at the inter-bilayer apical oxygen, forming a robust interlayer five-spin polaron state, which serves as the ground state for superconducting bilayer nickelates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐中发现的高温超导电性，激发了人们对于理解超越传统类铜氧化物d^9构型基态的非传统电子态的大量努力。理解磁基态与多轨道物理之间的相互作用，是建立超导微观机制的关键。在双层镍酸盐中，自旋密度波（SDW）序是非超导区域的一个显著特征。然而，其与超导配对的关系仍是一个未解之谜。在此，我们利用共振X射线散射来研究超导双层镍酸盐薄膜La$_2$PrNi$_2$O$_7$（LPNO）中SDW序的存在性。通过比较超导和缺氧的LPNO薄膜，我们发现超导电性出现在无SDW、氧化学计量比正常的区域，而缺氧则促进SDW序，表明SDW与超导电性存在相分离。此外，Ni-$L_3$和O-$K$边光谱揭示了这两个区域之间——特别是沿$c$轴方向——截然不同的电子结构。我们的结果确定了氧化学计量比是控制层间耦合，进而控制双层镍酸盐电子结构的关键参数。结合理论，我们提出配体空穴主要位于双层间的顶角氧上，形成了一个稳健的层间五自旋极化子态，该态作为超导双层镍酸盐的基态。</p></details> | 2026-05-04 | Jiarui Li et al. |
| 2 | **[Readout failures in superconducting qubits due to TLS-defects in tunnel junctions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02755v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Material defects give rise to parasitic two-level systems (TLS) which present a major source of decoherence in superconducting qubits. Here, we study a strongly coupled TLS that resides in the tunnel barrier of transmon qubit. We use multi-photon spectroscopy and TLS strain tuning to explore the rich spectrum of the interacting three-partite system consisting of TLS, qubit, and its readout resonator. This reveals a strong effective resonant coupling between the TLS and the qubit's readout resonator which dresses the resonator states and results in a resonance frequency shift that spoils the readout signal. Our finding presents yet another way how material defects can interfere with qubit operation and hinder the realization of solid-state quantum processors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>材料缺陷会产生寄生二能级系统（TLS），这是超导量子比特退相干的主要来源之一。在此，我们研究了一个位于transmon量子比特隧道势垒中的强耦合TLS。我们利用多光子光谱学和TLS应变调谐，探索了由TLS、量子比特及其读取谐振器组成的三体相互作用系统的丰富能谱。这揭示了TLS与量子比特读取谐振器之间存在强的有效共振耦合，这种耦合会修饰谐振器态，并导致共振频率偏移，从而破坏读取信号。我们的发现揭示了材料缺陷干扰量子比特运行并阻碍固态量子处理器实现的又一种方式。</p></details> | 2026-05-04 | J. Lisenfeld et al. |
| 3 | **[Emergent Zeeman-Resilient Superconductivity Beyond the Spin-Paramagnetic Limit in Ultrathin NiBi3](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.14590v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The spin-paramagnetic limit sets a fundamental magnetic-field bound for conventional superconductors. Here we show that ultrathin NiBi$_3$ films develop a highly field-resilient superconducting state, with in-plane critical fields surpassing the spin-paramagnetic limit even above 0.9T$_C$. This enhancement is activated by dimensional confinement and depends sensitively on film thickness and morphology. Standard mechanisms, including strong spin-orbit coupling and multiband superconductivity, fail to quantitatively explain the observed robustness. These findings uncover an unconventional pathway for Zeeman-resistant superconductivity in low-dimensional materials beyond known Ising and Rashba scenarios, and further support earlier theoretical predictions of triplet pairing in low-dimensional NiBi$_3$.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>自旋顺磁极限为传统超导体设定了基本的磁场上限。在此，我们展示超薄NiBi$_3$薄膜会发展出一种高度抗磁场的超导态，其面内临界磁场即使在0.9T$_C$以上也能超越自旋顺磁极限。这种增强效应由维度约束激活，并敏感地依赖于薄膜厚度和形貌。包括强自旋轨道耦合和多带超导电性在内的标准机制，无法定量解释所观测到的这种鲁棒性。这些发现揭示了一种超越已知伊辛和Rashba场景的低维材料中抗塞曼超导电性的非传统路径，并进一步支持了早期关于低维NiBi$_3$中三重态配对的理论预测。</p></details> | 2026-05-04 | Gabriel Sant'Ana et al. |
| 4 | **[Unconventional Superconductivity in $\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$ from the Perspective of Symmetry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.01764v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The recently discovered superconductor $\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$ has attracted significant attention due to its remarkably high transition temperature ($T_{c}$) under high pressure. Shortly after this discovery, thin-film $\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$ was demonstrated to exhibit ambient-pressure superconductivity; however, the corresponding $T_c$ is only about half that of the pressurized bulk material. This striking difference raises questions about the underlying mechanisms governing superconductivity in these two structures. To address this issue, we develop a phenomenological symmetry-based method to investigate the superconducting gap structure in $\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$. Using density-functional theory methods (DFT+$U$), together with the experimentally determined $T_c$ and structural symmetry, we find that both pressurized bulk and thin-film $\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$ exhibit $s_{\pm}$-wave pairing symmetry and two-gap superconductivity, yet their dominant microscopic pairing configurations are distinct. In the pressurized bulk, superconductivity is dominated by the out-of-plane pairing of the Ni-$d_{z^2}$ orbitals, while in the thin film, the in-plane pairing of the Ni-$d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbitals prevails. Furthermore, the observed reduction in $T_c$ can be attributed to this transition of the dominant pairing type, driven by the decreased ratio of inter-layer to intra-layer hoppings in the thin film. Our result sheds lights on the microscopic pairing in $\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$ and reveals the significance of the symmetry. This method can potentially be generalized to a broader range of unconventional superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>最近发现的超导体$\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$因其在高压下异常高的转变温度（$T_{c}$）而引起了广泛关注。在此发现后不久，薄膜$\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$被证实在常压下具有超导电性；然而，其相应的$T_c$仅为加压块体材料的一半左右。这一显著差异引发了对这两种结构中超导电性基本机制的疑问。为解决此问题，我们发展了一种基于唯象对称性的方法来研究$\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$的超导能隙结构。利用密度泛函理论方法（DFT+$U$），结合实验测得的$T_c$和结构对称性，我们发现加压块体和薄膜$\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$均表现出$s_{\pm}$波配对对称性和双能隙超导电性，但它们的微观主导配对构型截然不同。在加压块体中，超导电性由Ni-$d_{z^2}$轨道的面外配对主导，而在薄膜中，则由Ni-$d_{x^2-y^2}$轨道的面内配对主导。此外，观测到的$T_c$降低可归因于这种主导配对类型的转变，而该转变是由薄膜中层间跳跃与层内跳跃之比的减小所驱动的。我们的结果揭示了$\mathrm{La_{3}Ni_{2}O_{7}}$中的微观配对机制，并阐明了对称性的重要性。该方法有可能推广到更广泛的非常规超导体研究。</p></details> | 2026-05-04 | Guan-Hao Feng et al. |
| 5 | **[Nonreciprocal superconducting critical currents with normal state field trainability in kagome superconductor CsV3Sb5](https://arxiv.org/abs/2506.04601v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Determining time-reversal symmetry (TRS) and chirality in the superconducting state and its relation to normal-state symmetry and topology are important issues in condensed matter physics. Here, we report nonreciprocal superconducting critical currents (Ic) at zero magnetic field in kagome superconductor CsV3Sb5 nanodevices: Ic differs for opposite directions, indicating spontaneous TRS and inversion symmetry breakings. The polarity of Ic asymmetry changes randomly in repeated thermal cycling to 300 K, consistent with spontaneous TRS breaking. Crucially, on applying a perpendicular magnetic field above the charge density wave (CDW) transition temperature and then removing it to zero above the superconducting onset temperature (Tc), the polarity of Ic asymmetry follows the field direction, ascertaining that the CDW state has a macroscopic and trainable TRS-breaking directionality. The symmetry breaking continues into the superconducting state and generates the nonreciprocal critical currents. These results provide evidence for the loop-current CDW normal state with TRS breaking in CsV3Sb5.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>确定超导态中的时间反演对称性（TRS）和手性及其与常态对称性和拓扑性质的关系，是凝聚态物理中的重要问题。在此，我们报告了在kagome超导体CsV3Sb5纳米器件中零磁场下的非互易超导临界电流（Ic）：相反方向的Ic不同，表明自发TRS和反演对称性破缺。在重复热循环至300 K的过程中，Ic不对称性的极性随机变化，这与自发TRS破缺一致。至关重要的是，在电荷密度波（CDW）转变温度以上施加垂直磁场，然后在超导起始温度（Tc）以上将其降至零，Ic不对称性的极性会跟随磁场方向，从而确定CDW态具有宏观且可训练的TRS破缺方向性。这种对称性破缺持续进入超导态，并产生非互易临界电流。这些结果为CsV3Sb5中存在具有TRS破缺的环电流CDW常态提供了证据。</p></details> | 2026-05-04 | Jun Ge et al. |
| 6 | **[Observation of field-odd and field-free superconducting diode effects in $\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$ nanoflakes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.19525v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconducting diode effect (SDE) enables nonreciprocal supercurrent flow, holding immense potential for ultra-low-power quantum electronics. Intrinsic SDE typically requires materials with inherent symmetry breakings. Here, we report the discovery of SDE in chemical vapor deposition-grown molybdenum carbide ($\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$) nanoflakes, a material traditionally considered centrosymmetric. Strikingly, this system uniquely hosts both field-odd and field-free SDEs. Transport measurements reveal a field-odd SDE with tunable efficiency exceeding 40% at 4 K under a perpendicular in-plane magnetic field. In a separate sample, a robust field-free SDE persists under zero-field and field-coolings. Out-of-plane field sweeps confirm the intrinsic nature of these phenomena. We propose that domain-boundary supercurrents or charge density wave-like orders drive this unexpected combination of symmetry breakings. Our findings establish air-stable $\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$ as an ideal platform for nonreciprocal superconducting electronics operating at liquid-helium temperatures, expanding the search for SDE into nominally centrosymmetric superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管效应（SDE）可实现非互易超电流输运，在超低功耗量子电子学领域具有巨大潜力。本征SDE通常需要材料具有本征对称性破缺。本文报道在化学气相沉积生长的碳化钼（$\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$）纳米片中发现了SDE，而该材料传统上被认为具有中心对称性。引人注目的是，该体系独特地同时具有场奇和零场SDE。输运测量显示，在4K温度下施加垂直面内磁场时，场奇SDE的可调效率超过40%。在另一独立样品中，零场和场冷却条件下均存在稳健的零场SDE。面外磁场扫描证实了这些现象的本征特性。我们提出畴界超电流或电荷密度波序驱动了这种意外的对称性破缺组合。本发现将空气稳定的$\mathrm{Mo}_2\mathrm{C}$确立为液氦温度下非互易超导电子学的理想平台，将SDE的探索范围扩展至名义上的中心对称超导体。</p></details> | 2026-05-04 | Wei Gao et al. |
| 7 | **[Surface nanostructuring of NbTi superconducting thin-film resonators for enhanced cryogenic thermometry](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01915v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The rising complexity of cutting-edge cryogenic systems is currently imposing challenging technical constraints to the monitoring of ultra-cold temperatures through standard commercially available sensors. Among different alternative technologies, superconducting microwave resonators have been recently investigated as ideal candidates for performing on-chip cryogenic thermometry, in reason of their intrinsically low power dissipation, typically large temperature sensitivities and excellent sub-mK resolution below 10 K. In such a framework, through this study we aim at demonstrating the possibility to enhance the temperature performance of superconducting microwave resonators by means of surface nanostructuring. More specifically, different arrays of nanogaps are strategically patterned on the inductive line of a 1.3 GHz planar resonator, by partially etching a Nb50Ti50 thin film, in order to tune the critical transition of the material and, therefore, increase the curvature of the fres(T) response. Although the presence of such weak-links introduces larger microwave losses, a 1.5 K decrease of TC is recorded, which directly translates into an enhancement of the temperature sensitivity by a factor 10, with respect to a reference non-nanostructured sensor. In particular, a maximum value of dfres/dT = 62 MHz/K, at 4.2 K, is achieved for the device showing the largest nanogap width of about 350 nm, demonstrating that the surface nanostructuring of superconducting thin-films can be effectively engineered to enhance the temperature response of microwave resonators for high-performance cryogenic thermometry. We believe that similar approaches might be investigated and, eventually, adopted for the near-future development of the next generation of low-temperature sensors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>前沿低温系统日益增长的复杂性，正对通过标准商用传感器监测超低温施加严苛的技术限制。在众多替代技术中，超导微波谐振器因其本征低功耗、通常较大的温度灵敏度以及10K以下优异的亚毫开分辨率，近期被研究为片上低温测温的理想候选方案。在此框架下，本研究旨在证明通过表面纳米结构可增强超导微波谐振器的温度性能。具体而言，通过部分刻蚀Nb50Ti50薄膜，在1.3 GHz平面谐振器的电感线上策略性地制备了不同纳米间隙阵列，以调控材料的临界转变，从而增大fres(T)响应的曲率。尽管此类弱连接引入了更大的微波损耗，但记录到Tc降低了1.5 K，这直接转化为温度灵敏度相比未纳米结构参考传感器提升了10倍。其中，具有约350 nm最大纳米间隙宽度的器件在4.2 K时实现了dfres/dT = 62 MHz/K的最大值，证明可有效设计超导薄膜的表面纳米结构以增强微波谐振器的温度响应，用于高性能低温测温。我们认为类似方法值得进一步研究，并有望用于下一代低温传感器的近期开发。</p></details> | 2026-05-03 | André Chatel et al. |
| 8 | **[Two distinct superconducting regimes in Ti4Co2O under pressures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01893v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report on the pressure dependence of superconducting transition temperature Tc and upper critical field Bc2(0) through electrical transport of the Ti4Co2O superconductor (eg.,the superconducting transition temperature Tc = 2.5 K and the Bc2(0)=7.2T=2.9Tc). We find that the Tc exhibits non-monotonic pressure dependence:it rises monotonically at first with a pressure coefficient of dTc/dP=0.034 K/GPa, but rapidly decreases around 10-20 GPa, and then increases with the dTc/dP = 0.023 K/GPa, up to= 4.31 K at 69.7 GPa. Concurrently, the Bc2(0)exhibits a dome shaped pressure dependence, with its maximum at 5 GPa of almost twice the value at ambient pressure, exceeding the weak-coupling Pauli paramagnetic limit Bp throughout the whole pressure range. By comparing the normal-state and superconducting properties, we identify two distinct superconducting regimes, with a low-pressure superconducting phase characterized by an enhanced Bc2(0)values and Fermi-liquid normal-state electrical transport (the exponent n = 2), and a high-pressure superconducting phase with a monotonically increased Tc and an enhancement in phonon scatterings (the exponent n = 4). Room-temperature synchrotron X-ray diffraction indicates that there is no structural transition up to 55.8 GPa, which gives a relatively large bulk modulus of 192 GPa in comparison with other alloy superconductors. First-principles calculations suggest that the nonmonotonic Tc maybe closely related to the evolution of the density of states of Ti4Co2O upon compression, which is different from those of isostructural superconductors Ti4Ir2O and Nb4Rh2C. Our results show that even in the Ti4Co2O with weak spin-orbit coupling, superconductivity remains highly sensitive to the external stimuli such as pressure.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们通过电输运测量报道了Ti4Co2O超导体（例如超导转变温度Tc=2.5 K，上临界场Bc2(0)=7.2 T=2.9Tc）中超导转变温度Tc和上临界场Bc2(0)的压力依赖性。我们发现Tc呈现非单调压力依赖性：首先以dTc/dP=0.034 K/GPa的压力系数单调上升，随后在10-20 GPa附近快速下降，之后又以dTc/dP=0.023 K/GPa的系数上升，在69.7 GPa时达到4.31 K。同时，Bc2(0)呈现穹顶状压力依赖性，在5 GPa时达到最大值，约为常压值的两倍，且在整个压力范围内均超过弱耦合泡利顺磁极限Bp。通过比较正常态和超导态性质，我们识别出两个不同的超导区域：低压超导相具有增强的Bc2(0)值和费米液体正常态电输运（指数n=2），高压超导相则具有单调增加的Tc和增强的声子散射（指数n=4）。室温同步辐射X射线衍射表明，在55.8 GPa以下无结构相变，与其他合金超导体相比，其体模量较大为192 GPa。第一性原理计算表明，非单调Tc可能与Ti4Co2O在压缩下态密度的演化密切相关，这不同于同构超导体Ti4Ir2O和Nb4Rh2C。我们的结果表明，即使在自旋轨道耦合较弱的Ti4Co2O中，超导性对压力等外部刺激仍高度敏感。</p></details> | 2026-05-03 | Lifen Shi et al. |
| 9 | **[Evidence for room temperature superconductivity associated with a first-order phase transition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2306.13172v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>By making periodic thru-holes in a suspended film, the phonon system can be modified. Motivated by the BCS theory, the technique -- so-called phonon engineering -- was applied to a metallic niobium sheet. It was found that its electrical resistance dropped to zero at 175 K, and the zero-resistance state persisted up to 290 K in the subsequent warming process. Despite the initial motivation, neither these high transition temperatures nor the phase transition with thermal hysteresis can be accounted for by the BCS theory. Therefore, we abandon the BCS theory. Instead, it turns out that the metallic holey sheet is partly oxidized to form a niobium-oxygen square lattice, which has points of resemblance to a copper-oxygen plane, the fundamental component of cuprate high-$T_{c}$ superconductors. Therefore, the pairing mechanism underlying this study should be related to that of cuprate high-$T_{c}$ superconductors, which we may not yet understand. In addition to the electrical results of zero resistance, the holey sheet exhibited a decrease in magnetization upon cooling, i.e., the Meissner effect. Moreover, the remnant magnetization was clearly detected at 300 K, which can only be attributed to persistent currents flowing in a superconducting sample. Thus, this study meets the established criteria for a conclusive demonstration of true superconductivity. Finally, the superconducting transition with the unambiguous thermal hysteresis is discussed. According to Halperin, Lubensky, and Ma, or HLM for short, any superconducting transition must $always$ be first order with thermal hysteresis because of the intrinsic fluctuating magnetic field. The HLM theory is very compatible with the highly oriented system harboring two-dimensional superconductivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>通过在悬浮薄膜中制作周期性通孔，可调控声子系统。受BCS理论启发，该"声子工程"技术被应用于金属铌片。研究发现其电阻在175K时降至零，且在后续升温过程中零电阻态持续至290K。尽管有初始动机，但这些高转变温度及伴随热滞后的相变均无法用BCS理论解释。因此我们摒弃BCS理论。取而代之的是，金属多孔片部分氧化形成了铌-氧四方晶格，该结构与铜氧化物高温超导体的基本组分——铜氧面具有相似之处。因此，本研究的配对机制应与铜氧化物高温超导体相关，而该机制可能尚未被完全理解。除零电阻的电学结果外，多孔片在冷却时还表现出磁化强度下降，即迈斯纳效应。此外，在300K时清晰检测到剩余磁化强度，这只能归因于超导样品中持续电流的流动。因此，本研究符合确证真正超导性的既定标准。最后，讨论了伴随明确热滞后的超导转变。根据Halperin、Lubensky和Ma（简称HLM）的理论，由于本征的涨落磁场，任何超导转变必然是一级相变并伴有热滞后。HLM理论与具有二维超导性的高度取向体系高度兼容。</p></details> | 2026-05-03 | N. Zen et al. |
| 10 | **[Integration and Resource Estimation of Cryoelectronics for Superconducting Fault-Tolerant Quantum Computers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.03922v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Scaling superconducting quantum computers to the fault-tolerant regime calls for a commensurate scaling of the classical control and readout stack. Today's systems largely rely on room-temperature, rack-based instrumentation connected to dilution-refrigerator cryostats through many coaxial cables. Looking ahead, superconducting fault-tolerant quantum computers (FTQCs) will likely adopt a heterogeneous quantum-classical architecture that places selected electronics at cryogenic stages -- for example, cryo-CMOS at 4~K and superconducting digital logic at 4~K and/or mK stages -- to curb wiring and thermal-load overheads. This review distills key requirements, surveys representative room-temperature and cryogenic approaches, and provides a transparent first-order accounting framework for cryoelectronics. Using an RSA-2048-scale benchmark as a concrete reference point, we illustrate how scaling targets motivate constraints on multiplexing and stage-wise cryogenic power, and discuss implications for functional partitioning across room-temperature electronics, cryo-CMOS, and superconducting logic.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>将超导量子计算机扩展至容错体系需要经典控制和读取系统相应扩展。当前系统主要依赖室温机架式仪器，通过大量同轴电缆连接稀释制冷机低温恒温器。展望未来，超导容错量子计算机（FTQC）可能采用异构量子-经典架构，将选定电子器件置于低温级——例如4K级的低温CMOS和4K及/或mK级的超导数字逻辑——以控制布线和热负载开销。本综述提炼关键需求，调研代表性室温及低温方案，并为低温电子学提供透明的第一阶核算框架。以RSA-2048规模基准为具体参考点，我们阐明扩展目标如何对复用和分级低温功耗施加约束，并讨论跨室温电子学、低温CMOS和超导逻辑的功能划分启示。</p></details> | 2026-05-03 | Shiro Kawabata et al. |
| 11 | **[Topological Ising superconductivity in two-dimensional p-wave magnet](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01686v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Fermi-surface spin splitting generated by non-relativistic exchange fields provides a new route to topological superconductivity without relying on strong spin-orbit coupling. Here, we study superconducting instabilities of a square-lattice $p$-wave magnet with onsite and nearest-neighbour attractive interactions. The odd-parity exchange field removes inversion symmetry in the spin-split electronic structure, allowing singlet and triplet order parameters to mix within a single $A_1$ symmetry channel. The leading instability is a coupled $s+p_x$ Ising state, whose singlet-triplet balance is continuously tunable by the relative strength of the nearest-neighbour attraction. When the triplet gap amplitude exceeds the singlet one, this Ising state undergoes a transition into a nodal topological superconducting phase with Majorana edge modes protected by momentum-resolved winding numbers. These modes extend over finite momentum intervals bounded by the surface projections of bulk point nodes. We further show that a Zeeman field perpendicular to the exchange field can induce a $Z_2$ topological superconducting phase, even in the regime where a single gap dominates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>非相对论性交换场产生的费米面自旋劈裂为不依赖强自旋轨道耦合的拓扑超导提供了新路径。本文研究了具有格点内和最近邻吸引相互作用的四方晶格p波磁体的超导不稳定性。奇宇称交换场破缺了自旋劈裂电子结构中的反演对称性，允许单态和三态序参量在单一A₁对称性通道内混合。主导不稳定性表现为耦合的s+pₓ伊辛态，其单态-三态平衡可通过最近邻吸引相互作用的相对强度连续调节。当三态能隙幅值超过单态时，该伊辛态会转变为节点拓扑超导相，其马约拉纳边缘模受动量分辨绕数保护。这些边缘模延伸至由体节点表面投影界定的有限动量区间。我们进一步证明，垂直于交换场的塞曼场可诱导Z₂拓扑超导相，即使在单一能隙主导的区域内亦然。</p></details> | 2026-05-03 | Kyoung-Min Kim et al. |
| 12 | **[Enhanced Superconducting Diode Effect in the Asymmetric Hatsugai-Kohmoto Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2510.17452v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconducting diode effect (SDE), characterized by a nonreciprocal supercurrent, has attracted significant attention in recent years due to its potential applications. However, most studies have focused on weakly correlated models, leaving the impact of strong electron-electron interactions on the SDE largely unexplored. In this work, we bridge this gap by investigating the SDE in asymmetric band metals with Hatsugai-Kohmoto (HK) interaction, which are exactly solvable due to their locality in Bloch momentum space. Through a combination of low-energy analysis and a numerical self-consistent approach, we demonstrate that HK interaction can enhance the SDE's quality factor. Our findings shed light on the role of strong electron-electron correlations in shaping the SDE.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>以非互易超电流为特征的超导二极管效应（SDE）因其潜在应用近年来备受关注。然而，现有研究多聚焦于弱关联模型，强电子-电子相互作用对SDE的影响尚待探索。本文通过研究具有Hatsugai-Kohmoto（HK）相互作用的非对称能带金属中的SDE填补了这一空白——由于HK相互作用在布洛赫动量空间具有局域性，该模型可精确求解。结合低能分析与数值自洽方法，我们证明HK相互作用能提升SDE的品质因子。这一发现揭示了强电子-电子关联在塑造SDE中的关键作用。</p></details> | 2026-05-02 | Kai Chen et al. |
| 13 | **[Interplay between Superconductivity and Altermagnetism in Disordered Materials and Heterostructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.04819v4)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the interplay between superconductivity and altermagnetism in disordered systems using recently derived quantum kinetic transport equations. Starting from this framework, we derive the Ginzburg-Landau free energy and identify, in addition to the conventional pair-breaking term, a coupling between the spin and the spatial variation of the superconducting order parameter. Two distinct effects emerge from this coupling. The first is a nonlinear magnetoelectric effect, in which a supercurrent (i.e., a phase gradient) induces a spin texture; this contribution is quadratic in the phase gradient. The second effect arises when the magnitude, rather than the phase, of the superconducting order parameter varies in space, likewise leading to a finite magnetization. We show that these two contributions compete in the case of an Abrikosov vortex, where both the amplitude and phase of the order parameter vary spatially. The effect associated with amplitude variations also gives rise to a proximity-induced magnetization (PIM) in hybrid structures composed of a superconductor (S) and an altermagnet (AM). Using quasiclassical theory, we analyze the PIM in diffusive S/AM bilayers and S/AM/S Josephson junctions, and determine the induced magnetization profiles. In Josephson junctions, where both the PIM and the nonlinear magnetoelectric effect coexist, we further predict the occurrence of $0$-$π$ transitions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用近期推导的量子动能输运方程，研究了无序体系中超导与交变磁性的相互作用。基于该理论框架，我们推导了金兹堡-朗道自由能，并发现除传统对破缺项外，还存在自旋与超导序参量空间变化之间的耦合。该耦合产生两种不同效应：其一是非线性磁电效应——超电流（即相位梯度）诱导自旋织构，该项贡献与相位梯度呈二次关系；其二是当超导序参量的幅值（而非相位）在空间变化时，同样会产生有限磁化强度。我们证明，在阿布里科索夫涡旋中（序参量的幅值和相位均存在空间变化），这两种贡献相互竞争。与幅值变化相关的效应还会在由超导体（S）和交变磁体（AM）构成的混合结构中产生近邻诱导磁化（PIM）。利用准经典理论，我们分析了扩散型S/AM双层膜和S/AM/S约瑟夫森结中的PIM，并确定了诱导磁化分布。在同时存在PIM和非线性磁电效应的约瑟夫森结中，我们进一步预言了0-π跃迁的发生。</p></details> | 2026-05-02 | Rodrigo de las Heras et al. |
| 14 | **[Chip-scale superconducting quantum gravimeter combining a SQUID, a transmon, and a nanomechanical resonator](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.00425v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Precise gravitational measurements are vital for geophysics and inertial navigation, but compact gravimeters with high measurement bandwidth remain difficult to realize. We propose and analyze a chip-scale superconducting gravimeter in which a flux-tunable transmon qubit is coupled to a high quality factor ($Q_m$) nanomechanical beam. The beam is embedded in a SQUID loop placed in parallel with the qubit's flux-tunable SQUID; gravity induced beam displacement therefore modulates the qubit frequency through the SQUID flux and is mapped onto the qubit's geometric phase. A stroboscopic readout at mechanical revival times suppresses qubit mechanics dephasing, yielding a projected sensitivity of $10^2$--$10^3\,\mathrm{nGal}/\sqrt{\mathrm{Hz}}$ with sub-millisecond interrogation times. Electrical \emph{in situ} tunability and microwave-based calibration make this architecture a practical route toward compact, high-bandwidth on-chip gravimetry.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>精确重力测量对地球物理和惯性导航至关重要，但兼具高测量带宽的紧凑型重力仪仍难以实现。我们提出并分析了一种芯片级超导重力仪，其中通量可调的transmon量子比特与高品质因子（$Q_m$）纳米机械梁耦合。该梁嵌入与量子比特通量可调SQUID并联的SQUID环路中；因此，重力引起的梁位移通过SQUID通量调制量子比特频率，并映射到量子比特的几何相位上。在机械复兴时刻进行的频闪读出抑制了量子比特-机械退相，在亚毫秒探测时间内实现了$10^2$--$10^3\,\mathrm{nGal}/\sqrt{\mathrm{Hz}}$的预期灵敏度。电学原位可调性和基于微波的校准使该架构成为实现紧凑、高带宽片上重力测量的实用途径。</p></details> | 2026-05-01 | Salman Sajad Wani et al. |
| 15 | **[Electrically-controllable superconducting memory effect in UTe2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.02450v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>If a computer could be assembled from superconducting components, the energy efficiency would far surpass that of conventional electronics. Historic research efforts towards this goal yielded pivotal breakthroughs in the development and discovery of scanning tunnelling microscopy and high temperature superconductivity. Although recent strides have been taken in advancing superconducting diode and switching technologies, harnessing read/writeable memory functionality in superconducting platforms has remained challenging. Here we show that bulk single crystal specimens of the triplet superconductor candidate uranium ditelluride (UTe$_2$) possess such properties. Upon applying a magnetic field to access an intermediate regime straddling two distinct superconducting phases, we find that direct current pulses can push the material in and out of a metastable state possessing an enhanced critical current $J_c$. This switching is controllable by the strength and duration of the stimuli, with the system `remembering' whether it is in the high or low $J_c$ state for extended periods. We interpret this to be due to competition between two distinct vortex species, which can be perturbatively pushed into a non-equilibrium high-disorder configuration with stronger pinning forces and thus higher $J_c$. Rather than requiring proximate magnetic or semiconducting interfaces, this memory functionality appears to be an intrinsic property of UTe$_2$ rooted in the superconducting order itself. Our findings underscore the rich complexity of quantum vortex matter, and demonstrate the viability of engineering a new class of superconducting memory elements with ultralow-power switching.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>如果计算机能用超导元件组装而成，其能效将远超传统电子器件。历史上为实现这一目标的研究努力，在扫描隧道显微镜的研发和高温超导体的发现中催生了关键突破。尽管近年来超导二极管和开关技术取得了进展，但在超导平台上实现读写存储功能仍具挑战。我们在此展示，三重态超导体候选材料二碲化铀（UTe$_2$）的块体单晶样品具备此类特性。通过施加磁场进入横跨两个不同超导相的中间区域，我们发现直流电流脉冲可将材料推入或推出一个具有增强临界电流$J_c$的亚稳态。这种切换可由刺激的强度和持续时间控制，系统能长时间"记住"其处于高或低$J_c$状态。我们将此解释为两种不同涡旋物种之间的竞争，它们可被微扰推入具有更强钉扎力（从而更高$J_c$）的非平衡高无序构型。这种存储功能无需邻近的磁性或半导体界面，似乎是根植于超导序本身的内在属性。我们的发现凸显了量子涡旋物质的丰富复杂性，并展示了构建具有超低功耗切换能力的新型超导存储元件的可行性。</p></details> | 2026-05-01 | Zheyu Wu et al. |
| 16 | **[Learning Lindblad Dynamics of a Superconducting Quantum Processor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00626v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Accurate models of quantum processors are essential for understanding, calibrating, and improving their performance. In practice, model construction must balance physical detail against the experimental and computational effort required to reliably learn parameters. Compact descriptions therefore often rely on assumptions about which interactions, noise processes, or hidden degrees of freedom are relevant. Here we introduce LIMINAL, a data-driven framework for testing such assumptions and selecting minimal adequate Lindblad models. LIMINAL fits nested candidate models to time-resolved tomographic data and uses likelihood-ratio tests to decide when added physical mechanisms are warranted. We apply LIMINAL to a five-qubit superconducting processor, identifying an idling model with three-local Hamiltonian terms and two-local dissipation, while finding no support for three-local dissipation. We further apply it to recover driven single-qubit Hamiltonians, reconstruct a shaped-pulse Hamiltonian without assuming an analytic pulse model, and test hidden-qubit extensions in coupler-mediated dynamics, demonstrating the applicability of the framework for a wide range of tasks.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子处理器的精确模型对于理解、校准和提升其性能至关重要。实践中，模型构建必须在物理细节与可靠学习参数所需的实验和计算工作量之间取得平衡。因此，紧凑描述常依赖于关于哪些相互作用、噪声过程或隐藏自由度是相关的假设。我们在此介绍LIMINAL，一个用于测试此类假设并选择最小充分林德布拉德模型的数据驱动框架。LIMINAL将嵌套候选模型拟合到时间分辨层析数据，并使用似然比检验来判断何时需要添加物理机制。我们将LIMINAL应用于一个五量子比特超导处理器，识别出一个包含三局域哈密顿量项和两局域耗散的空闲模型，同时发现不支持三局域耗散。我们进一步将其用于恢复驱动单量子比特哈密顿量、在不假设解析脉冲模型的情况下重构成形脉冲哈密顿量，以及测试耦合器介导动力学中的隐藏量子比特扩展，证明了该框架在广泛任务中的适用性。</p></details> | 2026-05-01 | Johann Bock Severin et al. |
| 17 | **[Superconducting diode effect in correlated electron systems by nonreciprocal magnetism](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00601v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The superconducting diode effect (SDE), characterized by a nonreciprocal critical current in superconductors, has recently been observed in strongly correlated electron systems and near quantum criticality, pointing to unconventional mechanisms beyond weak-coupling theories. Here we investigate the SDE in the Rashba-Zeeman-Hubbard model, which captures $d$-wave superconductivity in an antiferromagnetic quantum critical regime, using the Dyson-Gor'kov equation with the fluctuation exchange approximation. We show that electron correlations suppress the conventional intrinsic SDE arising from depairing currents. More importantly, a supercurrent nonreciprocally induces antiferromagnetic order, which fundamentally governs the critical current and enables perfect diode efficiency. Our results reveal a previously unrecognized correlation-driven mechanism of the SDE and establish strongly correlated superconductors as a platform for superconducting diode physics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管效应（SDE）以超导体中非互易临界电流为特征，近期已在强关联电子系统及量子临界性附近被观测到，指向了超越弱耦合理论的非常规机制。我们利用基于涨落交换近似的Dyson-Gor'kov方程，研究了Rashba-Zeeman-Hubbard模型中的SDE，该模型捕捉了反铁磁量子临界区中的$d$波超导电性。我们展示，电子关联抑制了源于退对电流的传统本征SDE。更重要的是，超电流非互易地诱导出反铁磁序，该序从根本上决定了临界电流并实现了完美的二极管效率。我们的结果揭示了一种先前未被认识的、由关联驱动的SDE机制，并将强关联超导体确立为超导二极管物理的平台。</p></details> | 2026-05-01 | Kyohei Nakamura et al. |
| 18 | **[Suppression of Universal Errors in DFS-Encoded Superconducting Geometric Logical \emph{T} Gate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.00552v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>High-fidelity logical \emph{T}-gate realization constitutes a core prerequisite for large-scale fault-tolerant quantum computing. However, conventional magic state distillation requires massive physical qubit overhead across successive distillation rounds, alongside sophisticated measurement and feedback control, thereby inducing considerable spatial and temporal resource consumption. Herein, we propose a controlled superconducting geometric logical \emph{T} gate scheme that achieves high-order suppression of universal errors, by integrating decoherence-free subspace encoding with multi-loop optimized composite geometric pulse engineering. Guided by tailored trajectory design, we systematically establish unified gate construction frameworks for conventional geometric, composite geometric, and optimized composite geometric protocols. By flexibly controling additional parametric degrees of freedom, the proposed scheme achieves substantially enhanced robustness against diverse noise sources. Numerical simulations reveal that, within tunable superconducting quantum circuits, our geometric logical \emph{T} gate outperforms both conventional composite geometric and dynamical gates in suppressing Rabi frequency, detuning, and residual inter-qubit crosstalk errors that can all be suppressed to the fourth order, while additionally providing inherent suppression of collective dephasing errors. The present strategy alleviates intrinsic limitations of mainstream approaches and opens a promising avenue toward robust high-fidelity logical \emph{T} gate construction.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>高保真度逻辑$T$门的实现是大规模容错量子计算的核心先决条件。然而，传统的魔法态蒸馏需要在连续多轮蒸馏中使用大量物理量子比特，并配合精密的测量和反馈控制，从而引发可观的空间和时间资源消耗。在此，我们提出一种受控超导几何逻辑$T$门方案，通过将无退相干子空间编码与多环路优化复合几何脉冲工程相结合，实现了对通用误差的高阶抑制。在定制轨迹设计的指导下，我们系统地建立了常规几何、复合几何和优化复合几何协议的统一门构建框架。通过灵活控制额外的参数自由度，所提方案实现了对多种噪声源的显著增强鲁棒性。数值模拟揭示，在可调超导量子电路中，我们的几何逻辑$T$门在抑制拉比频率、失谐和残余量子比特间串扰误差方面优于常规复合几何门和动力学门，所有这些误差均可被抑制至四阶，同时还提供了对集体退相误差的本征抑制。本策略缓解了主流方法的固有限制，为构建稳健的高保真度逻辑$T$门开辟了一条有前景的途径。</p></details> | 2026-05-01 | Cheng-Yun Ding et al. |
| 19 | **[Fundamentals and Applications of Hybrid Electro- and Opto-mechanical system coupled to Superconducting Qubit: A Short Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.18186v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting qubits, realized by incorporating Josephson junctions into superconducting circuits, behave as artificial atoms with anharmonic energy spectra and can be precisely controlled and measured using microwave cavities within the framework of circuit quantum electrodynamics (cQED). Since its emergence in the early 2000s, cQED has established superconducting qubits as leading candidates for scalable quantum devices and has enabled the exploration of hybrid quantum systems that integrate disparate physical platformsThis review surveys superconducting hybrid quantum electromechanical systems in which mechanical resonators are coupled to superconducting qubits, with a focus on two widely used qubit platforms: the transmon and the fluxonium. We provide an overview of the underlying coupling mechanisms arising from interactions through the phase and charge degrees of freedom of the qubit, and discuss how these mechanisms give rise to both longitudinal and transverse qubit-mechanical interactions. We further review extensions of electromechanical platforms to electro-optomechanical architectures, in which optical cavities are integrated to enable coherent interfacing between superconducting circuits and optical photons. This review aims to present a unified framework and perspective on qubit-mechanical and qubit-mechanical-optical hybrid systems in superconducting quantum technologies and applications related to sensors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>通过将约瑟夫森结集成到超导电路中实现的超导量子比特，表现为具有非谐能谱的人造原子，并可在电路量子电动力学（cQED）框架下利用微波腔进行精确控制与测量。自21世纪初问世以来，cQED已将超导量子比特确立为可扩展量子器件的领先候选者，并推动了集成不同物理平台的混合量子系统的探索。本综述调研了机械谐振器与超导量子比特耦合的超导混合量子机电系统，重点关注两种广泛使用的量子比特平台：transmon和fluxonium。我们概述了由量子比特的相位和电荷自由度相互作用产生的底层耦合机制，并讨论了这些机制如何引发纵向和横向的量子比特-机械相互作用。我们进一步回顾了从机电平台向电-光-机械架构的拓展，其中集成了光学腔以实现超导电路与光学光子之间的相干接口。本综述旨在为超导量子技术及传感器相关应用中的量子比特-机械与量子比特-机械-光学混合系统提供一个统一的框架与视角。</p></details> | 2026-05-01 | Roson Nongthombam et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[The free energy limit of the SYK model at high temperature](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.02768v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev (SYK) model is a disordered quantum mean-field model studied in condensed matter physics and the holographic theory of black holes. Its structural properties can be derived heuristically using a combination of the replica method and path integration techniques. Analyzing it mathematically rigorously, however, turned out to be notoriously difficult, even for basic questions such as computing the annealed free energy. In this paper we rigorously compute the free energy limit (annealed and quenched) for this model at high enough but constant temperature. Our results are in numerical agreement with the results derived by physics methods. Remarkably, though, our method of proof is novel and is different from the physics approach. It is based on (a) the theory of the component structure of sparse random graphs and (b) a variant of the cavity method, used widely in prior rigorous and heuristic treatments of classical spin glasses.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev（SYK）模型是凝聚态物理与黑洞全息理论中研究的一种无序量子平均场模型。其结构性质可通过副本方法与路径积分技术的结合进行启发式推导。然而，即使对于退火自由能计算这类基本问题，对其进行严格数学分析也极为困难。本文在足够高但恒定的温度下，严格计算了该模型的自由能极限（退火与淬火情形）。我们的结果与物理学方法推导的数值结果一致。值得注意的是，我们的证明方法具有创新性，且不同于物理学方法，其基础在于：(a) 稀疏随机图分量结构理论；(b) 空穴方法的一种变体——该方法在经典自旋玻璃的严格与启发式研究中被广泛使用。</p></details> | 2026-05-04 | David Gamarnik et al. |
| 2 | **[Overlap locking and non-perturbative effects in spin glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.18399v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the phenomenon of the locking of the order parameter (or synchronization) in spin glasses at low temperatures. When two systems with independent disorders are coupled, their overlaps become similar. A crucial question is how this effect depends on the strength of the coupling between the two systems. Non-perturbative phenomena are present when $1 \ll ΔH \ll N$, being $ΔH$ the coupling Hamiltonian and $N$ the size of the system. In this intermediate-coupling region, the effect is related to finite-size free-energy corrections and to the correlations in the Dyson hierarchical spin glass, a model that mimics the physics of finite-dimensional systems. We study this phenomenon in the mean-field approach, both analytically and numerically, and we finally compute the critical exponents for finite-volume corrections in mean-field theory and for the decay of correlations in the Dyson hierarchical model.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了低温下自旋玻璃中序参量的锁定（即同步化）现象。当两个具有独立无序的系统耦合时，它们的重叠会趋于相似。一个关键问题是该效应如何依赖于两系统间的耦合强度。当耦合哈密顿量ΔH满足1 ≪ ΔH ≪ N（N为系统尺寸）时，会出现非微扰现象。在此中间耦合区域，该效应与有限尺寸自由能修正及Dyson层级自旋玻璃（模拟有限维系统物理的模型）中的关联有关。我们通过平均场方法对该现象进行了解析与数值研究，最终计算了平均场理论中有限体积修正的临界指数以及Dyson层级模型中关联衰减的临界指数。</p></details> | 2026-05-03 | Silvio Franz et al. |
| 3 | **[Cavity-mediated localization and collective electron correlation phases](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.01551v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Collective strong coupling of molecular ensembles to optical cavities opens a route to modifying matter through genuinely collective electronic correlations. Yet even in the absence of a cavity, Coulomb correlations are notoriously difficult to describe, and cavity coupling adds transverse correlation channels extending over the entire molecular ensemble. Here we show that this seemingly intractable problem admits a controlled description by mapping the collective intermolecular electronic correlations to the analytically solvable spherical Sherrington-Kirkpatrick model. The resulting theory predicts two collective correlation phases, a paracorrelated phase and a spin-glass correlation phase, beyond the conventional uncorrelated molecular regime. These phases reveal an entropy-driven localization-delocalization mechanism that transfers molecular electronic states into collectively correlated cavity-dressed states. Our work establishes cavity-mediated electron correlations as a microscopic mechanism for emergent phases in strongly coupled molecular ensembles.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>分子系综与光学腔的集体强耦合为通过真正集体电子关联修饰物质开辟了途径。然而，即使在没有腔的情况下，库仑关联也极难描述，而腔耦合则增加了延伸至整个分子系综的横向关联通道。本文证明，这一看似棘手的问题可通过将集体分子间电子关联映射至可解析求解的球形Sherrington-Kirkpatrick模型而得到可控描述。由此产生的理论预测了超越传统非关联分子体系的两种集体关联相：副关联相与自旋玻璃关联相。这些相揭示了一种熵驱动的局域-退局域机制，该机制将分子电子态转移至集体关联的腔修饰态。我们的工作确立了腔介导电子关联作为强耦合分子系综中涌现相的微观机制。</p></details> | 2026-05-02 | Dominik Sidler et al. |
| 4 | **[Spin glass phase at zero temperature in the Edwards-Anderson model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.04112v6)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Mean field spin glass models have undergone substantial mathematical development, but finite dimensional short range spin glasses remain much less understood. This paper proves several rigorous zero temperature signatures of glassy behavior for the Edwards-Anderson model with Gaussian couplings, in finite boxes in arbitrary dimension. First, the ground state is sensitive to small perturbations of the disorder: after a perturbation of size $p$, the new ground state is nearly orthogonal to the original one in site overlap once $p$ is sufficiently larger than the inverse system size. Second, the droplets generated by such perturbations have large interfaces; in the macroscopic-droplet regime, their boundaries satisfy lower bounds consistent with a fractal dimension strictly greater than $d-1$. Third, there exist macroscopic spin excitations whose energy cost is negligible compared with the size of their interface, in sharp contrast with ferromagnetic behavior. Fourth, the expected size of the critical droplet associated with a typical bond grows at least as a power of the volume. Finally, a natural boundary condition sensitivity for nearest-neighbor spin products cannot decay faster than order the inverse distance to the boundary, contrasting with recent exponential decay results for the two-dimensional random field Ising model. Taken together, these results provide rigorous evidence -- and, in the senses made precise below, proof -- of zero temperature glassy behavior in a short range spin glass model.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>平均场自旋玻璃模型已取得实质性数学进展，但有限维短程自旋玻璃仍远未被充分理解。本文针对具有高斯耦合的Edwards-Anderson模型，在任意维度的有限盒子中证明了玻璃态行为的若干严格零温特征。首先，基态对无序的微小扰动敏感：当扰动强度p足够大于系统尺寸倒数时，新基态在位置重叠上与原基态近乎正交。其次，此类扰动产生的液滴具有大界面；在宏观液滴区域，其边界满足的分形维数下界严格大于d-1。第三，存在宏观自旋激发，其能量代价与界面尺寸相比可忽略不计，与铁磁行为形成鲜明对比。第四，与典型键关联的临界液滴的预期尺寸至少随体积幂次增长。最后，最近邻自旋乘积的自然边界条件敏感性衰减速度不会快于距边界距离的倒数，这与二维随机场Ising模型最近的指数衰减结果形成对比。综合而言，这些结果为短程自旋玻璃模型的零温玻璃态行为提供了严格证据——并在下文精确意义下给出了证明。</p></details> | 2026-05-02 | Sourav Chatterjee et al. |
| 5 | **[The Synergistic Route to Stretched Criticality](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.28003v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Griffiths phases are typically associated with quenched disorder, while frustration gives rise to multistability and spin-glass behavior. Whether extended criticality can arise in other contexts remains an open question. Here, we show that synergistic interactions provide a distinct route to non-conventional critical phenomena. By combining spreading mechanisms that reinforce activity through complementary pathways, we uncover a broad distribution of relaxation rates, leading to Griffiths-like slow dynamics and extended criticality. We demonstrate that this mechanism is robust across networks and emerges both in systems with explicit higher-order interactions and in purely pairwise systems with nonlinear dynamics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>格里菲斯相通常与淬火无序相关，而阻挫则引发多稳态和自旋玻璃行为。在其它情境下是否会出现扩展临界性仍是一个悬而未决的问题。本文研究表明，协同相互作用为非传统临界现象提供了一条独特路径。通过结合通过互补途径增强活性的传播机制，我们发现了弛豫率的广泛分布，从而产生类格里菲斯慢动力学和扩展临界性。我们证明该机制在网络中具有鲁棒性，并且既出现在具有显式高阶相互作用的系统中，也出现在具有非线性动力学的纯成对系统中。</p></details> | 2026-04-30 | Lorenzo Lucarini et al. |
| 6 | **[Protein folding on a 64 qubit trapped-ion hardware via counterdiabatic quantum optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.26861v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report the largest trapped-ion hardware demonstration of lattice protein-folding optimization to date, using bias-field digitized counterdiabatic quantum optimization (BF-DCQO) on a fully connected 64-qubit Barium development system similar to the forthcoming IonQ Tempo line. Six peptide sequences with 14-16 amino-acid residues are encoded using a coarse-grained tetrahedral lattice model, yielding higher-order spin-glass Hamiltonians with long-range interactions involving up to five-body terms and mapped to 46-61 qubits. The resulting instances are demanding for near-term quantum hardware because low-energy configurations must satisfy backbone-geometry constraints while optimizing dense residue-contact interactions. BF-DCQO uses a non-variational bias-feedback mechanism, where low-energy samples from each round define longitudinal fields that guide subsequent quantum evolutions. Across the studied instances, BF-DCQO shifts raw sampled energy distributions toward lower energies than uniform random sampling, with the strongest improvements appearing in residue-contact variables. To preserve this signal, we introduce a consensus-based post-processing pipeline that combines quantum-learned contact information with feasible backbone geometries. The resulting hybrid workflow reaches the classical reference energy in multiple instances and improves over the corresponding random-seeded pipeline. These results show that BF-DCQO can generate structured samples for dense protein-folding Hamiltonians at previously unexplored trapped-ion scales.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报道了迄今为止最大规模的晶格蛋白质折叠优化囚禁离子硬件演示，在类似于即将推出的IonQ Tempo系列的64量子比特全连接钡离子开发系统上，采用偏置场数字化反绝热量子优化（BF-DCQO）方法。使用粗粒化四面体晶格模型编码了六种含14-16个氨基酸残基的肽序列，生成了包含最多五体项长程相互作用的高阶自旋玻璃哈密顿量，并映射至46-61个量子比特。由于低能构型必须在优化密集残基接触相互作用的同时满足主链几何约束，这些实例对近期量子硬件提出了较高要求。BF-DCQO采用非变分偏置反馈机制，利用每轮迭代中的低能样本定义纵向场，从而引导后续量子演化。在所研究的实例中，BF-DCQO将原始采样能量分布向低于均匀随机采样的方向偏移，其中残基接触变量的改进最为显著。为保留该信号，我们引入基于共识的后处理流程，将量子学习到的接触信息与可行主链几何结构相结合。由此产生的混合工作流在多个实例中达到经典参考能量，并优于相应的随机种子工作流。这些结果表明，BF-DCQO能够在先前未探索的囚禁离子规模下，为密集蛋白质折叠哈密顿量生成结构化样本。</p></details> | 2026-04-29 | Alejandro Gomez Cadavid et al. |
| 7 | **[Griffiths inequalities and Gibbs-Bogoliubov inequality for general gauge glasses with Gaussian disorder on Nishimori line](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.25697v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We consider a class of gauge glass models with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line, including the Ising spin glass, the $XY$ gauge glass, the $Z_q$ gauge glass, and the gauge-invariant Potts model. We prove that the first and second Griffiths inequalities hold for these models on arbitrary lattice structures. As a consequence, both the pressure and the correlation functions are monotonically increasing with respect to the inverse temperature along the Nishimori line. Furthermore, we establish an analogue of the Gibbs--Bogoliubov inequality for this class of models. This result implies that, on the Nishimori line, the approximate quenched free energy obtained via the replica method with a replica-symmetric mean-field approximation is always greater than the true quenched free energy. Our results provide a broad generalization of previous results established for the Ising spin glass with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们考虑西森线上具有高斯无序的一类规范玻璃模型，包括伊辛自旋玻璃、$XY$规范玻璃、$Z_q$规范玻璃以及规范不变波茨模型。我们证明，在任意晶格结构上，这些模型的第一和第二Griffiths不等式成立。由此可知，沿西森线，压强和关联函数均随逆温度单调递增。此外，我们为该类模型建立了吉布斯-博戈留博夫不等式的类比形式。该结果表明，在西森线上，通过复制对称平均场近似的复制方法获得的近似淬火自由能始终大于真实淬火自由能。我们的结果对先前针对西森线上高斯无序伊辛自旋玻璃所建立的结果进行了广泛推广。</p></details> | 2026-04-28 | Manaka Okuyama et al. |
| 8 | **[Replica Theory of Spherical Boltzmann Machine Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.17936v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Training in machine learning generally consists in finding one model, whose parameters minimize a data-dependent loss. Yet, empirical work shows that ensemble learning, an approach in which multiple models are sampled, can improve performance. Here, we provide an analytical framework to understand these observations in the case of Boltzmann machines, exploiting a duality between ensemble learning and large deviations of the free energy in spin-glass models. Replica calculations allow us to fully solve the case of spherical Boltzmann machine ensembles, and clarify when ensemble learning improves over standard loss minimization, in particular for nearly finite-dimensional data. Our framework can also be applied to complex data distributions, in agreement with numerical simulations on deep networks.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>机器学习训练通常旨在寻找单一模型，其参数能最小化数据相关的损失函数。然而实证研究表明，采用多模型采样的集成学习方法可提升性能。本文针对玻尔兹曼机建立分析框架，利用集成学习与自旋玻璃模型中自由能大偏差理论的对偶性来解释上述现象。通过副本计算，我们完整求解了球形玻尔兹曼机集成问题，阐明了集成学习在何种条件下优于标准损失最小化方法——尤其是针对近有限维数据。该框架还可应用于复杂数据分布，与深度网络数值模拟结果一致。</p></details> | 2026-04-27 | Thomas Tulinski et al. |
